Uses of Interface
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleComparableVerifier

Packages that use ExtensibleComparableVerifier 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension
Interfaces that may be extended but not implemented (because the methods contain a generic return type).
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension  

  • Uses of ExtensibleComparableVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Subinterfaces of ExtensibleComparableVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java 
    Modifier and Type Interface Description
    interface  BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a BigDecimal.precision().
    interface  BigDecimalVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a BigDecimal value.
    interface  ComparableVerifier<T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a Comparable.
    interface  FloatingPointVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a floating-point number.
    interface  IntegerVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of an integer number.
    interface  NumberVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of for a Number.
    interface  PrimitiveCharacterVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of a Comparable value.
    interface  PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive floating-point number.
    interface  PrimitiveIntegerVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive integer number.
    interface  PrimitiveNumberVerifier<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a primitive number (e.g.
    interface  SizeVerifier
    Verifies the requirements of the size of a collection.

  • Uses of ExtensibleComparableVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension

    Subinterfaces of ExtensibleComparableVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension 
    Modifier and Type Interface Description
    interface  ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a floating-point value but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a FloatingPointVerifier.
    interface  ExtensibleIntegerVerifier<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of an integer value but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a IntegerVerifier.
    interface  ExtensibleNumberVerifier<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Verifies the requirements of a value that extends Number but the implementing verifier is not guaranteed to be a NumberVerifier.

  • Uses of ExtensibleComparableVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement ExtensibleComparableVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier.
    class  BigDecimalPrecisionVerifierNoOp
    A BigDecimalPrecisionVerifier that does nothing.
    class  BigDecimalScaleVerifierImpl
    An implementation of PrimitiveNumberVerifier for a BigDecimal's scale.
    class  BigDecimalVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of BigDecimalVerifier.
    class  BigDecimalVerifierNoOp
    A BigDecimalVerifier that does nothing.
    class  BooleanVerifierNoOp
    A BooleanVerifier that does nothing.
    class  ComparableVerifierImpl<T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of ComparableVerifier.
    class  ComparableVerifierNoOp<T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    A ComparableVerifier that does nothing.
    class  DoubleVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of FloatingPointVerifier<Double>.
    class  FloatingPointVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A FloatingPointVerifier that does nothing.
    class  FloatVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of FloatingPointVerifier<Float>.
    class  IntegerVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of IntegerVerifier<Integer>.
    class  IntegerVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An IntegerVerifier that does nothing.
    class  LongVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of IntegerVerifier<Long>.
    class  NumberVerifierImpl<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of NumberVerifier.
    class  NumberVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A NumberVerifier that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveBooleanVerifierNoOp
    A PrimitiveBooleanVerifier that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveCharacterVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveCharacterVerifier.
    class  PrimitiveCharacterVerifierNoOp
    A PrimitiveCharacterVerifier that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveDoubleVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier for doubles.
    class  PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveFloatVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of PrimitiveFloatingPointVerifier for floats.
    class  PrimitiveIntegerVerifierImpl<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of PrimitiveIntegerVerifier.
    class  PrimitiveIntegerVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A PrimitiveIntegerVerifier that does nothing.
    class  PrimitiveNumberVerifierImpl<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of PrimitiveNumberVerifier.
    class  PrimitiveNumberVerifierNoOp<T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    A PrimitiveNumberVerifier that does nothing.
    class  SizeVerifierImpl
    Default implementation of a SizeVerifier.
    class  SizeVerifierNoOp
    A SizeVerifier that does nothing.

  • Uses of ExtensibleComparableVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal.extension that implement ExtensibleComparableVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  AbstractComparableVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleComparableValidator<V,​T>,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    Extensible implementation of ExtensibleComparableVerifier.
    class  AbstractComparableVerifierNoOp<S,​T extends Comparable<? super T>>
    A ExtensibleComparableVerifier that does nothing.
    class  AbstractFloatingPointVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleFloatingPointValidator<V,​T>,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier.
    class  AbstractFloatingPointVerifierNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An ExtensibleFloatingPointVerifier that does nothing.
    class  AbstractNumberVerifier<S,​V extends ExtensibleNumberValidator<V,​T>,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    Default implementation of ExtensibleNumberVerifier.
    class  AbstractNumberVerifierNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An ExtensibleNumberVerifier that does nothing.
    class  AbstractPrimitiveNumberVerifierNoOp<S,​T extends Number & Comparable<? super T>>
    An ExtensiblePrimitiveVerifier that does nothing.
